member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeClientExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for integrating OpenCode with Microsoft.Extensions.AI.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeClientExtensions.AsChatClient(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.IOpenCodeClient,LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates an from the OpenCode client.

example.code: IChatClient chatClient = openCodeClient.AsChatClient(); var response = await chatClient.GetResponseAsync([new ChatMessage(ChatRole.User, "Hello!")]);

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeClientExtensions.AsChatClient(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.IOpenCodeClient,System.String,LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates an with a specific session.
member.returns: A chat client implementation bound to the session.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeClientExtensions.AsChatClient(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.ISessionScope,LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.IOpenCodeClient,LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions)
member.summary: Creates an from a session scope. The chat client will use the scope's session and will not clean it up.
member.returns: A chat client implementation bound to the session scope.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Agent Framework services.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddOpenCodeChatClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions})
member.summary: Adds an implementation using OpenCode.
member.param: Optional delegate to configure the chat client options.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddKeyedOpenCodeChatClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.Action{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions})
member.summary: Adds a keyed implementation using OpenCode. Useful when you have multiple chat clients registered.
member.param: The key to use for the service.
Optional delegate to configure the chat client options.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter
member.summary: Utility class for converting between Microsoft.Extensions.AI messages and OpenCode messages.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToChatMessage(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.Message)
member.summary: Converts an OpenCode to a .

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToMessageParts(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage)
member.summary: Converts a to OpenCode message parts.
member.returns: A list of message parts representing the content.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToChatResponse(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.Message)
member.summary: Converts an OpenCode to a .

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToChatRole(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.MessageRole)
member.summary: Converts an OpenCode to a .

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToMessageRole(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatRole)
member.summary: Converts a to an OpenCode .

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToAIContent(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.MessagePart)
member.summary: Converts an OpenCode to an .
member.returns: The equivalent AIContent, or null if the part type is not supported.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToMessagePart(Microsoft.Extensions.AI.AIContent)
member.summary: Converts an to an OpenCode .
member.returns: The equivalent MessagePart, or null if the content type is not supported.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToChatMessages(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.Message})
member.summary: Converts a collection of OpenCode messages to ChatMessages.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.MessageConverter.ToChatResponseUpdate(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.Models.MessageUpdate)
member.summary: Converts an OpenCode to a .
member.returns: A ChatResponseUpdate, or null if there's no content.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClient
member.summary: An implementation of that wraps an OpenCode session. Enables using OpenCode as a chat backend through the Microsoft.Extensions.AI abstractions.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClient.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the metadata for this chat client.

member.name: M:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClient.#ctor(LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.IOpenCodeClient,LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClient.SessionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the session ID for this chat client. If not set, a new session will be created on the first message.

member.name: T:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring the .

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions.Directory
member.summary: Gets or sets the working directory for sessions.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions.ModelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the model ID to report in metadata.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions.BaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the base URL to report in metadata.

member.name: P:LionFire.OpenCode.Serve.AgentFramework.OpenCodeChatClientOptions.CreateSessionPerConversation
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to create a new session for each conversation. Defaults to false (reuse session).
